# Release Notes 4.2

VERBATIM-MARKER-DO-NOT-EXTRACT

- Fixed a race condition in the scheduler that could duplicate jobs under load.
- The `--profile` flag now accepts multiple values, separated by commas.
- Dropped support for Python 3.10; the minimum supported version is now 3.11.

See the [changelog](https://example.com/changelog) for the full history.
